---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new component or improvement to the chart
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you think this should be implemented. Include example `values.yaml` snippets if applicable.

```yaml
# example
bootstrap:
  newComponent:
    enabled: true
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or references here.
